zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Warenne於1256年2月9日出生在英國素可沃倫時，他的父親John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey24歲，母親Alice de Lusignan19歲。他於1285年6月10日與Joan de Vere在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年12月15日在英國素瑞可洛頓享年30歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Warenne于1256年2月9日出生在英国素可沃倫时，他的父亲John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey24岁，母亲Alice de Lusignan19岁。他于1285年6月10日与Joan de Vere在英国英格兰素瑞结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年12月15日在英国素瑞可洛頓享年30岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Warenne was born on 9 February 1256, in Warren, Sussex, England, his father, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, was 24 and his mother, Alice de Lusignan, was 19. He married Joan de Vere on 10 June 1285, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 December 1286, in Croydon, Surrey, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Warenne est né le 9 février 1256, à Warren, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice de Lusignan, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Vere le 10 juin 1285, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1286, à Croydon, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Warenne am 9. Februar 1256 in Warren, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey 24 und seine Mutter Alice de Lusignan 19. Er hat am 10. Juni 1285 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Joan de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1286 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Croydon, Surrey, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne è nato il il 9 febbraio 1256 nel Warren, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Lusignan, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Vere il 10 giugno 1285, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1286, nel Croydon, Surrey, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Warenneが1256年2月9日にイギリススセックスワーレンで生まれた時，父John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surreyは24歳，母Alice de Lusignanは19歳であった。1285年6月10日にイギリスイギリススリーでJoan de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1286年12月15日にイギリススリークロイドンで30歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Warenne(이)가 1256년 2월 9일 영국 수세스 워르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Lusignan(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1285년 6월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Joan de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 12월 15일 영국 수리 크로이던에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

mn.9 February 1256–15 December 1286: 1256 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 9–1286 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 15

pt.9 February 1256–15 December 1286: 9 de fevereiro de 1256–15 de dezembro de 1286
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Warenne nasceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1256, em Warren, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Lusignan, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Vere em 10 de junho de 1285, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1286, em Croydon, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Warenne родился 9 февраля 1256 г. в местности варрен, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Lusignan, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Vere 10 июня 1285 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 декабря 1286 г. в местности кроидон, сурри, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

sm.from 1283 to 1284: mai le 1283 e o'o I le 1284

es.9 February 1256–15 December 1286: 9 de febrero de 1256–15 de diciembre de 1286
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Warenne nació el 9 de febrero de 1256, en Warren, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice de Lusignan, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan de Vere el 10 de junio de 1285, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1286, en Croydon, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
